alt: Hoatzin perched attentively in the high canopy of Colombia
caption: Older siblings frequently assist parent birds in guarding and feeding newly hatched chicks in the colony nest.
attributionText: Photo by Alejandro Bayer Tamayo from Armenia, Colombia via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 2.0
